content.query:
-- ********************************************************************************** --
-- parameter: [customer].[ext_inc_claims_1000006_20240229_20240701_ELS_Cohort_Geo%_t] --
-- ********************************************************************************** --

delete from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t];

-- 1. redact age, gender, zip3
insert into [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t]
(
    [record_id],
    [input_token],
    [input_dos_begin],
    [input_dos_end],
    [passthrough_free_field],
    [claim_number],
    [claim_type],
    [dos_begin],
    [dos_end],
    [pract_npi],
    [svc_facility_npi],
    [patient_id],
    [patient_gender],
    [patient_age],
    [patient_zip3],
    [line_seq],
    [procedure_scheme],
    [procedure_code],
    [proc_md_1],
    [proc_md_2],
    [proc_md_3],
    [proc_md_4],
    [diagnosis_code1],
    [diagnosis_code2],
    [diagnosis_code3],
    [diagnosis_code4],
    [diagnosis_code5],
    [diagnosis_code6],
    [diagnosis_code7],
    [diagnosis_code8],
    [diagnosis_code9],
    [diagnosis_code10],
    [diagnosis_code11],
    [diagnosis_code12],
    [diagnosis_code13],
    [diagnosis_code14],
    [diagnosis_code15],
    [diagnosis_code16],
    [diagnosis_code17],
    [diagnosis_code18],
    [diagnosis_code19],
    [diagnosis_code20],
    [icd_version],
    [drg_code],
    [ndc_code],
    [setting_of_care],
    [units_of_service],
    [payer],
    [line_of_business],
    [flg_837],
    [claim_charge_amnt],
    [claim_paid_amnt],
    [claim_allowed_amnt],
    [patient_resp_amt]
)
select 
    c.[record_id],
    c.[input_token],
    c.[input_dos_begin],
    c.[input_dos_end],
    c.[passthrough_free_field],
    c.[claim_number],
    c.[claim_type],
    c.[dos_begin],
    c.[dos_end],
    c.[pract_npi],
    c.[svc_facility_npi],
    c.[patient_id],
    -- redact gender
    case when c.[PATIENT_GENDER] is null or c.[PATIENT_GENDER] = '' then 'U' else c.[PATIENT_GENDER] end AS [patient_gender],
    -- redact age
    case when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) > 85 then '85' when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) < 1 then '1' else c.[PATIENT_AGE] end AS [patient_age],
    -- redact zip3
    case when z2.zip3 is null or c.[patient_zip3] is null or c.[patient_zip3] = '000' or c.[patient_zip3] = '' then '000' 
    when m.[input_token] is null then coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[patient_zip3]) 
    else substring(coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[patient_zip3]), 1, 2) 
    end AS [patient_zip3],
    c.[line_seq],
    c.[procedure_scheme],
    c.[procedure_code],
    c.[proc_md_1],
    c.[proc_md_2],
    c.[proc_md_3],
    c.[proc_md_4],
    c.[diagnosis_code1],
    c.[diagnosis_code2],
    c.[diagnosis_code3],
    c.[diagnosis_code4],
    c.[diagnosis_code5],
    c.[diagnosis_code6],
    c.[diagnosis_code7],
    c.[diagnosis_code8],
    c.[diagnosis_code9],
    c.[diagnosis_code10],
    c.[diagnosis_code11],
    c.[diagnosis_code12],
    c.[diagnosis_code13],
    c.[diagnosis_code14],
    c.[diagnosis_code15],
    c.[diagnosis_code16],
    c.[diagnosis_code17],
    c.[diagnosis_code18],
    c.[diagnosis_code19],
    c.[diagnosis_code20],
    c.[icd_version],
    c.[drg_code],
    c.[ndc_code],
    c.[setting_of_care],
    c.[units_of_service],
    c.[payer],
    c.[line_of_business],
    c.[flg_837],
    c.[claim_charge_amnt],
    c.[claim_paid_amnt],
    c.[claim_allowed_amnt],
    c.[patient_resp_amt]
from 
    [customer].[ext_inc_claims_1000006_20240229_20240701_ELS_Cohort_Geo1_t] c 
    left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
        on c.[patient_zip3] = z1.zip3_from
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
        on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[patient_zip3]) = z2.zip3
    left join [appl].[elsevier_mortality_tokens_t] m
        on c.[input_token] = m.[input_token];
GO


-- 2. correct age for patients with multiple ages in a year
update c
set c.[PATIENT_AGE] = a.min_patient_age
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join [appl].[elsevier_claims_corrected_age_t] a
        on c.[input_token] = a.[token] 
        and try_cast(substring(c.[DOS_BEGIN], 1, 4) as integer) = a.[dos_year];
GO


-- 3. redact procedure code
-- CREATE STATISTICS deid_claims_1_procedure_code ON [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t]([PROCEDURE_CODE]);
update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.suppression 
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] h
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'HCPCS';
GO

update c
set c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.suppression
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
        on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.code 
        and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD' + icdp.icd_version 
        and icdp.type = 'Procedure';
GO


-- 4. redact procedure modifiers
update c
set c.[PROC_MD_1] = null
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_1] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_2] = null
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_2] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_3] = null
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_3] = h.code
GO

update c
set c.[PROC_MD_4] = null
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[PROC_MD_4] = h.code
GO


-- 5. redact DRG code
update c
set c.[DRG_CODE] = null
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
    on c.[DRG_CODE] = drg.code 
GO


-- 6. redact setting_of_care
update c
set c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.suppression
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] c
    inner join
    (
        select 'P' as claims_type, code, suppression from [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t]
        union
        select distinct 'I' as claims_type, substring(code, 1, 3) as code, null as suppression from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) a
    on c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = a.claims_type
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = a.code
;


-- 7. redact diagnosis code
update [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] 
set [diagnosis_code1] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and ((try_cast(substring([diagnosis_code1], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or [diagnosis_code1] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
    or [diagnosis_code1] like 'V3%' or [diagnosis_code1] like 'E910%' or [diagnosis_code1] like 'E913%' or substring([diagnosis_code1], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;
GO

update [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] 
set [diagnosis_code1] = 'V8541'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '9'
    and [diagnosis_code1] in ('V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;
GO

update [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] 
set [diagnosis_code1] = null
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and ([diagnosis_code1] like 'P%' or [diagnosis_code1] like 'V%' or [diagnosis_code1] like 'S06%7A' or [diagnosis_code1] like 'S06%8A'  or [diagnosis_code1] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
    or substring([diagnosis_code1], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

update [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_diff_etl_t] 
set [diagnosis_code1] = 'Z6841'
where [ICD_VERSION] = '10'
    and [diagnosis_code1] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO
